_meta.description: FM Kit to DS Kit component mapping for hifi conversion
_meta._authoringNote: dsKey is canonical (immutable Figma component_set/component key). dsSlug is auto-regenerated by /sync-design-system from dsKey on each run; do not hand-edit dsSlug. Entries in `unmappable` are free-form composition guidance and don't carry dsKey/dsSlug.

fmIconButtons.notes: FM icon buttons collapse all types into DS Icon type; FM Type is dropped

fmTextInput.notes: FM 'Type' axis maps to DS 'States' axis. FM combines state+content into one axis.

fmDialog._note: FM-side has no intent-bearing variants today; intentVariants reserved for future expansion when fmDialog gains variants in a Figma sync.

fmDropdown.notes: FM 'Type' conflates state and type; maps to DS 'State' axis with DS Type=Default

fmMultiSelectDropdown.notes: Always maps to DS Type=Search/Multiple. FM 'Type' maps to DS 'State' axis.

fmCheckbox.notes: FM 'State' (On/Off) maps to DS 'Selected' axis. FM 'Style' maps to DS 'State' axis (Default | Hover | Focus | Pressed | Disabled).

fmRadioButton.notes: FM 'State' (On/Off) maps to DS 'Selected' axis. FM 'Style' maps to DS 'State' axis.

fmToggle.notes: FM 'State' (Off/On) maps to DS 'Selected' axis. FM 'Style' maps to DS 'State' axis.

fmAppHeader.notes: FM 'Type' maps to DS 'App type'. FM 'Actian' has no DS match; falls back to Explorer. DS adds Breakpoints axis (default XL).

fmNavBar.notes: FM 'Property 1' maps to DS 'View' axis. DS 'App' axis has no FM equivalent (default Admin).

fmPageHeader.notes: DS page-header has limited Type variants (Default, Details page, Explorer home, Explorer detail). All FM types map to Default.

fmSearchInput.notes: FM 'Type' conflates content state; maps to DS 'State' axis with DS Type=Inline. Note DS has typo 'Dsiabled' for disabled state.

fmDateInput.notes: FM 'State' maps to DS 'States' axis. Note DS uses 'Activ' (typo) for active state and 'Fille' (typo) for filled.

fmAlert.notes: DS 'Orientation'' axis has trailing apostrophe (typo in Figma). FM Error maps to DS Danger.

fmToast.notes: DS notification has only Default and Critial (typo) types. Both FM styles map to Default.

fmBadge.notes: DS badge has only Number and Dot types. FM Size axis (Small/Medium/Large) has no DS equivalent.

fmChip.notes: No DS chip component exists. Tag, Interactive is the closest equivalent. FM Outline axis has no DS mapping.

fmTag.notes: DS tag-default uses Color axis instead of Style. FM Style axis has no direct mapping.

fmStepper.notes: FM Upcoming maps to DS Default. DS also has State5 which is unused.

fmEmptyState.notes: FM 'Type' axis maps to DS 'Size' axis. DS also has Large.

fmProgressBar.notes: DS has only 0%, 50%, 100% completeness. FM granular percentages are bucketed to nearest DS value.

fmTooltip.notes: DS tooltip has only Type=Default with no position variants. FM Position axis is dropped.

fmTextArea.notes: No direct DS textarea exists. Rich text is the closest multi-line input. FM Content axis maps loosely to DS State axis.

unmappable.fmStickyNote: FM-only annotation tool for wireframes. No DS equivalent -- remove during hifi conversion.
unmappable.fmPlaceholder: FM-only wireframe content placeholder (Label+1line, metric, etc.). No DS equivalent -- replace with actual content or DS empty-state.
unmappable.fmCursor: FM-only annotation showing cursor types (Link, Pointer, Dragging, Text). No DS equivalent -- remove during hifi conversion.
unmappable.fmSlider: No DS slider/range component exists. Reconstruct as auto-layout frame with DS tokens if needed.
unmappable.fmInputLabel: FM-only label helper. DS input components have built-in label properties -- set label boolean/text on the DS input directly.
unmappable.fmBanner: Not yet in fmkit.json registry. When synced, map to DS alert-banner.
unmappable.fmSpinner: Not yet in fmkit.json registry. When synced, map to DS spinner.
unmappable.fmTabs: Not yet in fmkit.json registry. When synced, map to DS tabs container.
unmappable.fmNavItem: FM Nav Item is a single nav row. The standalone `nav item` component_set in DS Kit is intentionally hidden from publishing — designers want consumers to compose Side nav via instances rather than the row directly. During hifi conversion, replace FM Nav Item instances with rows inside an instance of `side-nav` (set 13599:20120, axes App=Admin/Studio, View=Collapsed/Expanded). FM State On/Off/Placeholder corresponds to the row-level Selected/Default/Disabled, but those rows aren't directly addressable through the published DS API.
unmappable.fmTab: DS `.tab` is hidden from publishing (internal building block — designers want consumers to compose `tabs` rather than place individual tabs). Compose tabs as rows inside an instance of `tabs` (set 14747:14818). FM `State.On` → row `Selected.Yes`; FM `State.Off`/`Placeholder` → row `Selected.No`. FM `Show Icon` property maps to row-level `Icon`.
unmappable.fmMenuItem: DS `.menu item` is hidden from publishing (internal building block). Compose menu items as rows inside `dropdown-select-default` (set 13972:708) or `search-dropdown-menu` (set 8756:9994). FM `State.Default` → row `State.Default`; FM `State.Hover` → row `State.Hovered`; FM `State.Active` → row `State.Selected`.
unmappable.fmMultiSelectMenuItem: DS `.menu item` is hidden from publishing. Compose multi-select menu items as rows inside `dropdown-select-default` (set 13972:708, multi-select variant). FM `State.On` → row `Selected.Yes`; FM `State.Off`/`User Off` → row `Selected.No`. FM `Dropdown item text` property maps to row-level `Label text`.
unmappable.fmTableCell: DS `.Table cell` is hidden from publishing (internal building block). Compose cells inside `table` rows (set 15295:14902). FM `Type.Header/Text/Pill/Placeholder` corresponds to cell-level `Type.Header/Text/Tag/Skeleton`.
